question: Which famous AIDS activist was a castmate on a reality television show with the spouse of the current U.S. Secretary of Transportation?

chain.fact: The current U.S. Secretary of Transportation is Sean Duffy.
Sean Duffy is married to Rachel Campos-Duffy.
Rachel Campos-Duffy was a cast member on The Real World: San Francisco.
The Real World: San Francisco cast included Pedro Zamora, a prominent AIDS educator and activist.

role_reference: the current U.S. Secretary of Transportation
